noticias.titulo: Stock Market Today, June 4: Nu Holdings Jumps After Board Approves $1 Billion Share Buyback
noticias.resumo: Today, June 4, 2026, a fresh $1 billion buyback pits Nu’s record growth against mounting governance and credit worries.

noticias.titulo: Stock Market Today, June 3: Nu Holdings Slides After Analyst Downgrade Highlights Margin and Leadership Risks
noticias.resumo: Margin pressure, leadership turnover, and record profits collide as investors reassess this fast-growing digital bank, today, June 3, 2026.
